id.description: Canonical project id, PRJ-NNN-CODE (e.g. PRJ-001-AUR). Unique across all projects.

code.description: Short mnemonic that namespaces this project's document ids and item ids (e.g. AUR). Matches the id tail.

sponsor.description: The accountable individual. A name or handle, not a team.

profile.description: Optional. Names a profiles/<name>.yaml that defines this project's expected document set (required/recommended kinds).
